title: Editorial + Natural + Cafe
prompt:
[IMAGE TYPE: Fashion campaign photography]
[SUBJECT REFERENCE: @img1 wearing @img2]
[OUTFIT: high-waisted extreme wide-leg trousers in deep tobacco brown fine-knit wool — floor length, fitted from hip to knee then flaring dramatically, tucked-in fitted long-sleeve turtleneck in burnt ochre, wide cognac leather belt sitting at the natural waist, cognac leather platform ankle boots with a block heel, one thin gold chain necklace — nothing else]

[SUBJECT ACTION: Standing, body turned slightly to the side, head angled away from camera — caught mid-laugh, completely unguarded, genuine uncontrollable amusement. One hand raised to the chest gripping the lapel loosely. Magazine editorial. Not performing. The expression is real, emotional..]
[SHOT TYPE: extreme Close-up, cropped at chest, 3:4 framing. Subject slightly off-center, generous negative space behind.]
[CAMERA ANGLE: Eye level, slightly to the side — three-quarter profile, face turned away from lens.]
[LENS: 85mm, f/2.0 — shallow depth of field, background dissolves into soft neutral tones, sharp focus on face and glasses.]

[LIGHTING: Soft directional 5200K daylight. Golden, realistic skin texture.]
[ENVIRONMENT: Standing in front of a Space Age cafe exterior in France in 1970's.]
[COLOR GRADE: Kodak Portra 400, warm amber highlights, muted midtones, faded warm blacks.]
[MOOD & ATMOSPHERE: Parisian nonchalance, quiet, candid, unhurried.]
[TECHNICAL SPECS: Leica M11, fine analog grain, soft optical vignette, sharp focus on frames and face, unretouched.]

title: Editorial + Natural + Interior
prompt:
[IMAGE TYPE: Fashion campaign photography]
[SUBJECT REFERENCE: @img1 messy bun wearing @img2 with realistic reflections]
[SUBJECT ACTION: Standing, back leaning against the hotel room wall, weight shifted onto one shoulder. Arms loosely crossed, one hand holding a glass of champagne at hip level. Looking directly into the camera — expression still, composed, a small barely-there smile. Knows she is being watched.]
[SHOT TYPE: Medium shot, cropped at waist, 3:4 framing. Subject centered, hotel room interior receding in soft focus behind her.]
[CAMERA ANGLE: Eye level, shooting straight on — direct frontal gaze, full face to camera.]
[LENS: 50mm, f/2.8]
[LIGHTING: Single practical bedside globe lamp positioned low to the right just out of frame — warm tungsten side light raking across her from below at roughly 30 degrees, approximately 3200K. Her body against the wall means the wall behind her falls into deep warm shadow. Light catches the cheekbone, jaw and one shoulder, the left side of the face drops naturally into brown-amber shadow with no fill. Slight warm haze in the room air. No overhead light. No cool tones anywhere.]
[ENVIRONMENT: Space Age hotel room interior, 1970s France. Burnt orange or olive velvet upholstered headboard visible behind her, warm wood paneling on the walls, bedside globe lamp as practical light source, geometric wallpaper in muted amber and brown tones, deep pile carpet. Sealed interior — no daylight, no windows visible.]
[COLOR GRADE: Kodak 5248 motion picture film stock, warm amber cast throughout — highlights roll off to soft warm cream, shadows retain depth with a brown-amber base, no cool tones anywhere, low contrast with a print-like quality, skin rendered in warm golden tones, naturally faded blacks.]
[TECHNICAL SPECS: Canon F-1 1970s SLR, fine analog grain throughout, soft optical vignette, sharp focus on frames and face, unretouched, period-accurate film rendering.]

title: Editorial + Soft + Studio
prompt:
image type: [Photography, commercial jewelry campaign]
camera angle: [Eye-level close-up, slightly off-center three-quarter profile view]
subject focus: [German 30 year old woman's face and ear, beautiful defined editorial face with defined cheekbones, ]
clothing: [Minimal neutral soft green toned top]
action/pose: [Head turned to three-quarter or full profile, relaxed expression, no smile or subtle smile, chin slightly lifted]
environment: [Studio, seamless light grey background, no texture or gradient]
colour tone: 
[Light-to-medium skin with a warm, sun-kissed base and prominent golden-amber undertones.The overall finish is soft and matte, with a balanced saturation that highlights a healthy, even glow without significant redness or cool-toned shadows]

lighting and mood: [Flat diffused studio lighting from a large soft source, minimal shadows, even skin illumination, clean polished commercial mood]
visual effects: [Sharp focus on earring and surrounding skin, very shallow depth of field on hair edges, high-end beauty retouching with smoothed skin texture while retaining select natural details like freckles and pores]
lens: [85mm–100mm short telephoto lens, f/2.8–f/4 for tight framing with subtle background separation]

title: Editorial + Harsh + Mediterranean
prompt: [IMAGE TYPE: Fashion campaign photography] [SUBJECT REFERENCE: @img1 wearing @img2 and @img3 wearing @img4] [SUBJECT ACTION: @img1 and @img3 stand close together in a shared, quiet moment, looking directly at each other with intense, silent eye contact. AWARE dynamic. @img1 is slightly angled toward @img3, who has her head tilted slightly up. Unposed, candid interaction. No smiling.] [SHOT TYPE: Close chest-up shot, 1:1 square crop using deliberate proximity] [CAMERA ANGLE: Slightly low angle, observing the intimacy] [LENS: 85mm] [LIGHTING: Strong hard directional sunlight from upper left — high contrast, bright and warm on the left side of the face, deep natural shadow falling across the right cheek and jaw. No fill light, no reflector, no diffusion. Late morning outdoor sun — 6000K, direct, unfiltered. Highlights on crown and shoulders lifted close to white. The light does not move.] [ENVIRONMENT: Mediterranean building exterior with limestone render and a softly out-of-focus sage-green painted shutter in the background. Rich historical texture on the stone.] [COLOR GRADE: Kodak Portra 160 in direct outdoor sun — slightly lifted highlights, open shadows, warm accurate skin tones, no crushed darks.] [MOOD & ATMOSPHERE: Intimate, still, sun-drenched, high-fashion editorial.] [TECHNICAL SPECS: 1:1 square aspect ratio, pushed 35mm film quality, fine visible grain, medium format photographic presence, no digital harshness. @img1 wears chunky cream boucle open cardigan over a fine-knit olive and cream striped crewneck sweater, pleated wide-leg grey wool trousers, woven brown leather belt, thin gold chain necklace, small gold stud earring. @img3 wears mid-wash indigo denim overshirt worn fully open over a coral red fine-ribbed crewneck knit sweater, wide-leg white and cream thin pinstripe casual shorts, woven leather belt with gold buckle, thin gold pendant necklace, small gold stud earring.]

title: Editorial + Harsh + Urban
prompt: [IMAGE TYPE:] High-fashion editorial photography, Jimmy Fairly eyewear campaign [SUBJECT REFERENCE:] @img1 wearing @img2 [SUBJECT ACTION:] Subject looking down with a slight tilt of the chin, dominant and composed. Sunglasses perfectly positioned, displaying the lower rim of the frames. [SHOT TYPE:] Chest-level portrait crop, tightly framed to emphasize the jawline, gold necklace, and frames. Centered subject, minimal headroom, deliberate negative space on the right. [CAMERA ANGLE:] Low angle, shooting slightly upward toward the subject. [LENS:] 35mm lens, slight perspective exaggeration without distorting the product. [LIGHTING:] Strong hard directional sunlight from the upper left. Bright highlights on the crown and left shoulder of the cream cardigan, deep shadow draping the right side of the face and neck. Crisp reflection on the gradient amber lens. [ENVIRONMENT:] Out-of-focus urban New York scene, blurred high-rise architecture reaching up behind the subject. [COLOR GRADE:] Kodak Portra 160 film emulation, warm accurate skin tones, lifted highlights close to white, open shadows, fine visible grain. [MOOD & ATMOSPHERE:] Imposing, sun-drenched, unapologetic. [TECHNICAL SPECS:] 1:1 square format, medium format camera, 6000K white balance, no fill light, no reflector, no diffusion.

title: Editorial + Harsh + Urban
prompt: IMAGE TYPE:] Fashion eyewear editorial campaign photography [SUBJECT REFERENCE:] @img1 wearing @img2 [SUBJECT ACTION:] Body angled slightly away in a three-quarter stance, with the face turned back squarely toward the lens. Jawline is set, expression is stoic, no smiling. [SHOT TYPE:] Waist-level crop, composed tightly within a 1:1 square canvas. Centered subject with minimal headroom. Deliberate negative space on the left side of the frame. [CAMERA ANGLE:] Eye level, slight three-quarter perspective on the body. [LENS:] Medium format 80mm lens, shallow depth of field. [LIGHTING:] Strong hard directional late morning sunlight from the upper left. 6000K direct, unfiltered. High contrast: bright and warm on the left side of the face, deep natural shadow falling across the right cheek and jaw. A sliver of direct sunlight catches the sunglass lens. Highlights on crown and shoulders lifted close to white. No fill light, no reflector, no diffusion. [ENVIRONMENT:] Out-of-focus urban New York scene. Shot close enough that no specific location is identifiable. [COLOR GRADE:] Kodak Portra 160. Slightly lifted highlights, open shadows, warm accurate skin tones, fine visible grain, no crushed darks, no digital harshness. [MOOD & ATMOSPHERE:] Sharp, alive, sun-drenched, striking and editorial. [TECHNICAL SPECS:] 1:1 square aspect ratio, razor-sharp focus on the sunglasses and face, medium format photographic presence.

title: Editorial + Harsh + Nature
prompt: [IMAGE TYPE:] Fashion eyewear editorial photograph [SUBJECT REFERENCE:] @img1 wearing a white textured cardigan over an olive striped t-shirt and gold necklace, styling @img2 black rectangular sunglasses with amber gradient lenses [SUBJECT ACTION:] Looking directly into the lens, perfectly still, expressionless and stoic. The sunglasses sit perfectly level on the face, with the black acetate frame catching a sharp, brilliant sliver of direct sunlight. [SHOT TYPE:] Tight chest-level close-up crop, centered composition with minimal headroom — exactly one head-width above the crown. [CAMERA ANGLE:] Dead-on, exact eye level. [LENS:] Medium format 110mm portrait lens. [LIGHTING:] Strong hard directional sunlight from upper left, high contrast. Bright and warm on the left side of the face, deep natural shadow falling heavily across the right cheek and jaw. No fill light, no reflector, no diffusion. Late morning 6000K sun, highlights on the shaved crown and left shoulder lifted close to white. [ENVIRONMENT:] Out-of-focus outdoor natural environment. Warm green-gold foliage bokeh rendering as soft, organic texture and color only. Completely unidentifiable background. [COLOR GRADE:] Kodak Portra 400 film emulation, direct outdoor sun. Slightly lifted highlights, open shadows, warm accurate skin tones, fine visible grain, no digital harshness. [MOOD & ATMOSPHERE:] Sharp, alive, sun-drenched, striking high-fashion eyewear editorial. [TECHNICAL SPECS:] 1:1 square aspect ratio, razor-sharp focus on the sunglasses and facial features, shallow depth of field dropping off at the shoulders.
